{"code":"(def merged-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))

(def prs-closing-linear (filter :closes_linear merged-prs))

(def linear-issues (map (fn [pr] (linear_issues {:id (:closes_linear pr)})) prs-closing-linear))

(def non-done-issues (filter #(not= (:state %) "done") linear-issues))
